title: Molí Market, Sant Lluís
location: Carrer de Sant Lluís (zona del molino), Sant Lluís
description: Sant Lluís's Molí Market is a summer market held on certain Friday evenings (roughly 19:00 to 23:00), usually every fortnight between June and August, with crafts and local offerings around the village windmill. Exact 2026 dates to be confirmed with Sant Lluís town council.
